fullText:
MCLN EX98 Printer Requester Error Messaging Handling Configuration Guide Table of Contents TOC \o "1-7" \z \u \h 1 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETUP PAGEREF _Toc182571542 \h 3 1.1 Enable System Code C-000 PAGEREF _Toc182571543 \h 3 2 Add additional Custom Codes PAGEREF _Toc182571544 \h 5 2.1 C-000-EX98 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc182571545 \h 5 3 EX98 Transaction Parameter enablement PAGEREF _Toc182571546 \h 6 3.1 RF Receiving PAGEREF _Toc182571547 \h 6 3.2 RF Pack Cubed Directed PAGEREF _Toc182571548 \h 8 3.3 RF Pick to Tote PAGEREF _Toc182571549 \h 10 3.4 RF Pack Pick Cart PAGEREF _Toc182571550 \h 12 4 Message Master PAGEREF _Toc182571551 \h 14 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETUP Enable System Code C-000 Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un-editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. Add additiona l C ustom C odes 1. Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C-000- EX98 if it has not been added. 2. Search for system code C-000: Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. 3. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. 4. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. 5. Click ADD action button. 6. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above. 7. Click SAVE. C-000-EX 9 8 Enablement 1. Click the Blue Parameters Tab. 2. Located next to the DETAILS tab. 3. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. 4. CLICK SAVE. EX98 Transaction Parameter enablement RF Receiving Open Transaction Parameters UI, filter for Receiving Transaction s *RECV* . Click on “ NEW Recv -Mixed Item ” or any receiving transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right. Click “Add” Enter in the following informati o n so it looks like the image below. Hit “Save” Confirm Receiving transaction s ha ve newly created parameters. Select Edit, select check box , and save. Enable this parameter for all necessary receiving transactions RF Pack Cubed Directed Open Transaction Parameters UI . Filter for Pack Cubed Directed Transactions . Click on “ Pck Cubed Dir-CRT ” or any pack cubed dir transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right. Click “Add” Enter in the following informati o n so it looks like the image below. Hit “Save” Confirm Receiving transaction s ha ve newly created parameters. Select Edit, select check box , and save. Enable this parameter for all necessary pack cubed directed transactions RF Pick to Tote Open Transaction Parameters UI . Filter for Pick to Tote Transactions . Click on “ Pick to Tote Multis ” or any Pick to Tote transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right. Click “Add” Enter in the following informati o n so it looks like the image below. Hit “Save” Confirm Receiving transaction s ha ve newly created parameters. Select Edit, select check box , and save. Enable this parameter for all necessary pick to tote transactions RF Pack Pick Cart Open Transaction Parameters UI . Filter for Pack Pick Cart Transactions . Click on “ EX33 Pack Pick Cart ” or any Pack Pick Cart transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right. Click “Add” Enter in the following informati o n so it looks like the image below. Hit “Save” Confirm Receiving transaction s ha ve newly created parameters. Select Edit, select check box , and save. Enable this parameter for all necessary pick to tote transactions Message Master If EX98 CUST Message 9801 is not already present, navigate to the M essages UI and select M essage M aster      Click the Plus button near the top right to add a new message      Add the message below   Go back to the message screen and ensure the message is configured  The message type can be configured in the Message Master UI to ERROR or OVERRIDE

[Document: MCLN EX98 Printer Requester Error Messaging Handling Configuration Guide]

MCLN EX98 Printer Requester Error Messaging Handling Configuration Guide Table of Contents TOC  "1-7"    1 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETUP  1.1 Enable System Code C-000  2 Add additional Custom Codes  2.1 C-000-EX98 Enablement  3 EX98 Transaction Parameter enablement  3.1 RF Receiving  3.2 RF Pack Cubed Directed  3.3 RF Pick to Tote  3.4 RF Pack Pick Cart  4 Message Master  GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETUP Enable System Code C-000 Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un-editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. Add additiona l C ustom C odes 1. Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C-000- EX98 if it has not been added. 2. Search for system code C-000: Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. 3. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. 4. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. 5. Click ADD action button. 6. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above. 7. Click SAVE. C-000-EX 9 8 Enablement 1. Click the Blue Parameters Tab. 2. Located next to the DETAILS tab. 3. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. 4. CLICK SAVE. EX98 Transaction Parameter enablement RF Receiving Open Transaction Parameters UI, filter for Receiving Transaction s *RECV* . Click on “ NEW Recv -Mixed Item ” or any receiving transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right. Click “Add” Enter in the following informati o n so it looks like the image below. Hit “Save” Confirm Receiving transaction s ha ve newly created parameters. Select Edit, select check box , and save.
